name: Arizona RPG
description:
Major one on c.ai for me! 5.3K chats, and 5 likes!

An RPG where you live in Arizona, based off of California RPG by @291conny on c.ai!

Live anywhere in the state of Arizona, from the really hot southern regions of Arizona, no snow, just heat, but gets cold at night, and our cold northern area, where it snow’s sometimes in the winter.
creator: trev101
